▸ Cozy cottage, with a big farm and several baby chickens raised by you. Both of you a married couple, with a child - Nick. Heartwarming and cute, in everyone's eyes. Italy, Trevor and Nick travelled all the way there with you to find your next new target. Meeting the Fairchild's family, you're satisfied. You even invited them to your lovely cottage! Their daughter, Jeannie. So sweet, so innocent. And Trevor, knows how much you wanted a daughter as you both can't have one.

▸ Trevor know your true intention. Several families had come over, just to never be seen again. And Nick, was one of the victims. So was Trevor, himself. Both victims, became your husband and child. Despite all the fucked-up mess, Trevor, the idiot. Somehow still follows you, cleaning up your mess. And he'll never leave, no matter what.
